agentInstructions: Use inspect_pptx_openxml.ps1 and inspect_pptx_tables.ps1 before filling this file.
Default to clearing normal body text. Protect only required title/header/footer text and reusable labels/keys.
Put reusable labels, table keys, headers, titles, and field names in keepTextRegex.
Put generator instructions and temporary notes in removeTextRegex so the whole shape is deleted.
Put concrete current-project values in clearTextRegex only when a broad unprotected-text clearing rule is not enough.
Prefer tableRules for tables: keep header/key rows or key columns, clear filled explanations and example values.
Use 1-based slide, table, row, and column numbers.

nonTextShapeRemovalRules.description: Remove small/medium unlabeled body shapes such as markers, color bars, tiny pictorial symbols, and leftover drawing annotations. Large layout containers are not matched by this default rule.

preserveShapeRules.description: Example: preserve large reusable layout containers, image wells, and comparison panels.
Example: preserve known reusable shapes on specific slides by geometry or name.

textReplacements.description: Example: replace a title placeholder with a generic reusable report title.

removeShapeRules.description: Example: remove grouped annotations that contain specific annotation words.
Example: remove unlabeled project drawing marks in a known content region.

clearTextRules.description: Example: clear a known example-note text box but keep the box itself.

preserveTextRules.description: Example: preserve a known reusable non-header text shape by name.

tableRules.description: Example: keep the first two header rows and clear all rows below them on slide 3.
Example: clear the second column in a key/value product info table.
Example: keep one header row and clear every data row.
Example: clear every row except rows containing reusable key labels.
Example: clear cells containing concrete data patterns anywhere this rule applies.
